title: US SEC, Elon Musk to argue for Twitter settlement before DC judge
summary: Attorneys for the SEC and Elon Musk will argue for a $1.5 million settlement over Musk's delayed disclosure of a 5% stake in Twitter. The settlement resolves an SEC lawsuit alleging Musk saved $150 million by not reporting his stake in April 2022.

title: China tech giant Tencent sees Q1 profit jump after AI bets
summary: Tencent reported a 21% surge in quarterly net profit, reaching 58.1 billion yuan, driven by significant investments in the booming artificial intelligence sector. The tech giant is actively competing in AI, unveiling model upgrades and reportedly considering investments in startups, despite rising A

title: Alibaba quarterly revenue rises on cloud demand, ecommerce growth
summary: Alibaba's revenue climbed 3% driven by strong cloud and AI growth, with its China e-commerce unit boosted by government subsidies. Despite economic headwinds, the tech giant's enterprise AI platform shows promise. While cloud revenue exceeded expectations, overall revenue slightly missed estimates d

title: AI orders flow in at Germany's Siemens but profit slips
summary: Siemens is witnessing a significant surge in orders driven by the AI boom, particularly from data centre investments. Despite a slight dip in quarterly profit, the company's infrastructure division saw record growth. Siemens anticipates this AI-fueled demand to continue strongly for several years.

title: Anthropic in talks to buy AI tools startup Stainless for over $300 million: The Information
summary: AI firm Anthropic is reportedly in advanced talks to buy Stainless for over $300 million. Stainless builds software for easier AI model access. This comes as Anthropic also explores raising at least $30 billion in new funding. The company's valuation could exceed $900 billion.

title: Fractal says enterprise AI market still wide open as Q4 profit more than doubles
summary: AI services firm Fractal Analytics saw net profit more than double to Rs 116 crore in Q4, driven by improved margins. CEO Srikanth Velamakanni highlighted the expanding enterprise AI market as a vast opportunity, not a zero-sum game, with strong demand and a focus on outcome-driven models.

title: Uber to set up first India data centre with Adani Group
summary: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi announced the company's first data center in India, a collaboration with the Adani Group, set to launch later this year. This facility will be instrumental in testing and deploying Uber's technology at scale.

title: Enterprise software company Zoho invests Rs 70 crore in ONDC
summary: Zoho Corporation has invested Rs 70 crore in ONDC to bolster India's sovereign technology and empower MSMEs. title: Ixigo launches fully AI-native app and assistant, introduces agentic travel features
summary: Travel platform ixigo has launched an AI-native app designed for seamless travel discovery, decision-making, and booking through natural voice interactions. The upgraded app features an AI travel assistant, TARA, offering hyper-personalized recommendations and handling complex queries.

title: Dhan parent enters insurance broking with GreenLife acquisition
summary: Raise Financial, parent of stock trading platform Dhan, has acquired GreenLife Insurance for approximately $15 million in a cash and stock deal. This strategic move aims to build a direct consumer and insurance distribution business, leveraging GreenLife's decade-long expertise.
